hero.question: Will Ubisoft be acquired before 2027?
hero.prob_take: The 10-point dump signals serious skepticism after Ubisoft's Q3 earnings disappointed, with buyers of the status quo betting the company stabilizes before any suitor shows real interest. At 35%, the market's overpricing Ubisoft's independence case, given Tencent's existing stake and activist pressure on CEO change, watch January earnings and any board turnover as your real catalyst.

daily_take.headline: Ubisoft Acquisition Odds Tank 10 Points. Smart Money Sees What?
daily_take.deck: Ubisoft acquisition odds dropped from 45% to 35% in 24 hours on no major news. The market's pricing in continued independence, but that assumes the company turns around its slumping pipeline and keeps activist investors at bay. A 10-point dump this fast usually means someone with real conviction just sold big, or consensus finally shifted on deal likelihood.

sidebar.headline: Somalia strikes jumping 15 points signals confidence in February escalation, not uncertainty. Worth questioning if this reflects actual military planning or just market momentum.
sidebar.label: US-Somalia Strikes Feb 2026: 96.0%

sidebar.headline: India's T20 odds rising fast at 45.5%, but they're the defending champs and tournament favorites. Market might be overweighting recency bias here.
sidebar.label: India 2026 T20 World Cup: 45.5%

sidebar.headline: Anduril IPO odds cratered 22 points to 28.5%. Either funding changed or timeline expectations shifted. Watch for Series C news or valuation reports.
sidebar.label: Anduril IPO Before 2027: 28.5%
